CE1.justification: Acted directly on the flagged pattern with no clarifying questions or requests for prior context.

CE2.justification: Several stretches of justification — the 'I deliberately did *not* write...' paragraph and the trailing 'Say the word and I'll draft it' offer pad the response well past the task.

CE3.justification: Names the destination (observations.md) and the reason (third sighting, cross-cutting, not yet a commitment) in one short clause up front.

CE4.justification: Two discrete file appends/creates with no half-written artifacts; an interrupt at any point leaves a coherent observation plus daybook stub.
